originalTitle: Hungary's public news broadcasts halted in bid to scrap Orban-era propaganda
summary: The country's main state TV channel displayed a message saying it was "sorry" for lying on Tuesday.
content:
A message apologising for having lied "for years" was broadcasted on Hungary's main public television channel on Tuesday

Hungary's main public television channel has halted news broadcasts, while a state-run radio station has been suspended altogether, in a bid to make its media "independent and trustworthy".

The country's former prime minister, Viktor Orbán, who was ousted in April after 16 years in power, had tightly controlled state media.

Reforms to media were a key campaign promise of Hungary's new Prime Minister Péter Magyar, who described the announcement as "the end of propaganda broadcasts".

Both TV channel M1 and Kossuth radio station temporarily halted transmission on Tuesday afternoon, with the former displaying a message that read: "Public media should not lie. We are sorry for doing it for so long".

The message, which was shown in white writing on a black screen, continued: "Public media now will be reformed so it will be independent and trustworthy. Our news programme is currently suspended. Stay tuned!"

Kossuth's frequencies were instead broadcasting classical music station Bartok Radio, according to AFP news agency.

As Hungary's main public radio station, Kossuth usually focuses on news, current affairs, sports, and culture.

Websites for both M1 and Kossuth were also down on Tuesday afternoon, AFP added.

A statement from MTVA, which runs M1, said the channel would temporarily restart in a new format without news programmes, with bulletins gradually introduced alongside a new editorial team.

Following the announcement, Magyar described it as a "historic day" which "marks the end of propaganda broadcasts on public media platforms".

"They lied at night, they lied during the day, they lied on every wavelength. That is now over," he added.

Magyar previously called for a new public service media

Orbán said the move was "another example of Tisza [Hungary's ruling party] tyranny", in a Facebook post on Tuesday.

He encouraged his followers to instead watch the Hir TV channel, which is affiliated with his political party Fidesz.

Magyar promised Hungarians "regime change" when he swept to power in a landslide victory earlier this year , having broken away from Orbán's party in March 2024.

He previously said that a majority of Hungarian media had been requisitioned by Orbán allies, insulting him and his party with lies and not allowing him an appearance on state TV since September 2024.

But days after winning the election, Magyar appeared on both Kossuth radio and M1, confirming his aim to suspend their news coverage and form a new broadcast authority to ensure press freedom.

TV2, a commercial broadcaster aligned with Fidesz, has also seen its main news anchors and its news director exit since Magyar came to power.

Hungarian PM threatens to oust Orbán-era president

EU hails Hungary's 'wind of change' and unlocks €16.4bn for new PM Magyar
chineseTitle: 匈牙利公共新闻广播暂停，以废除欧尔班时代的宣传
chineseSummary: 该国主要国家电视台播放了一条消息，称其对周二的撒谎感到“抱歉”。
chineseContent:
周二，匈牙利主要公共电视频道播出了一条为“多年来”撒谎而道歉的信息

匈牙利主要公共电视频道已停止新闻广播，一家国营广播电台也已完全暂停，以使其媒体“独立且值得信赖”。

该国前总理欧尔班·维克托 (Viktor Orbán) 严格控制官方媒体，他在位 16 年后于 4 月被赶下台。

媒体改革是匈牙利新总理彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 的一项重要竞选承诺，他将这一宣布描述为“宣传广播的终结”。

周二下午，M1 电视频道和 Kossuth 广播电台都暂时停止了传输，前者播放了一条消息，上面写着：“公共媒体不应该撒谎。我们很抱歉这么长时间这样做”。

该消息在黑屏上以白色字体显示，继续说道：“公共媒体现在将进行改革，使其独立且值得信赖。我们的新闻节目目前已暂停。请继续关注！”

据法新社报道，科苏特的频率改为播放古典音乐电台巴托克广播电台。

作为匈牙利主要的公共广播电台，科苏特通常专注于新闻、时事、体育和文化。

法新社补充说，周二下午，M1 和 Kossuth 的网站也瘫痪了。

运营 M1 的 MTVA 发表声明称，该频道将暂时以新格式重启，不再播放新闻节目，并逐步引入公告和新的编辑团队。

宣布这一消息后，马扎尔将其描述为“历史性的一天”，“标志着公共媒体平台上宣传广播的结束”。

“他们在晚上撒谎，他们在白天撒谎，他们在每个波长上撒谎。现在一切都结束了，”他补充道。

马扎尔此前曾呼吁建立新的公共服务媒体

欧尔班周二在脸书上发帖称，此举是“蒂萨（匈牙利执政党）暴政的又一个例子”。

他鼓励追随者转而观看 Hir 电视频道，该频道隶属于他的政党青民盟 (Fidesz)。

马扎尔于 2024 年 3 月脱离欧尔班的政党，并于今年早些时候以压倒性胜利上台执政，当时他向匈牙利人承诺“政权更迭”。

他此前表示，大多数匈牙利媒体都受到欧尔班盟友的征用，用谎言侮辱他和他的政党，并自 2024 年 9 月起不允许他在国家电视台露面。

但在赢得选举几天后，马扎尔出现在 Kossuth 电台和 M1 电台上，确认了他暂停新闻报道并组建新广播机构以确保新闻自由的目标。

自马扎尔上台以来，与青民盟结盟的商业广播公司 TV2 的主要新闻主播和新闻总监也已退出。

匈牙利国会议员阻止欧尔班回归，将总理的任期限制为八年

匈牙利总理威胁要罢免欧尔班时代总统

欧盟赞扬匈牙利的“变革之风”，并为新任总理马扎尔拨款164亿欧元
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
